title: Latest run lookup for monitors
goal: Expose a harness-neutral daemon/status lookup for the latest run in a repository so monitors can attach without knowing a run id.
acceptance: State has a deterministic latest-run query scoped to repo path, with an active-only mode for pending/running runs.
The daemon exposes latest run details through the same RunDetails shape used by status --run, including progress and recent events.
The CLI exposes JSON lookup via khazad-doom status --repo <path> --latest, returning a null/empty result when no matching run exists.
Existing status --run and daemon-wide status behavior remain backward compatible.
Tests cover latest active selection, repo scoping, and empty-result behavior.
must_ask_if: The implementation would remove or rename existing status fields or commands.
